### SHEET: screen-io  (dims=A1:Z56, images=0)
B1=Project | C1=Demo ERP | F1=Module | G1=PUR | I1=Purchase Order Entry | S1=Screen ID | T1=PUR-ORD-001M

C8=Search | E8=New | G8=Save | I8=Submit | K8=Approve

B28=Constraint | C28=- Submitted orders require approval before release
B38=3. Table Info
